diagnostic_authorization_context.user_intent: Diagnose how advanced, safe and stable CONTENT ENGINE is at maximum level before deciding unified interface 7L.

architecture.interpretation: Repository architecture and artifact structure maturity.

governance.interpretation: Gate, await, manifest, seal and sync governance maturity.

evidence.interpretation: Report, summary, manifest, seal and evidence volume/integrity maturity.

security.interpretation: Runtime blocking, authorization, productive action blocking and safety maturity.

stability.interpretation: Clean/synced repo, JSON validity, manifest integrity and seal integrity maturity.

intelligence.interpretation: Decision, gate, next_safe_step, authorization and evidence reasoning signal maturity.

unified_interface_7l_readiness.interpretation: Readiness to begin architecture blueprint for one unified intelligent 7-level interface.

overall.interpretation: Overall CONTENT ENGINE maturity for next governed architectural decision.

required_before_runtime: Define data source map from CONTENT ENGINE evidence
Define ARGOS integration boundary without runtime
Run implementation readiness gate after blueprint

checks.detail: Repo clean and synced before max-level diagnostic.
No future governed scope was selected before this diagnostic.
No future governed scope was authorized before this diagnostic.
No future governed scope was executed before this diagnostic.
Dashboard, ARGOS, button, productive and future scope runtime remained false.
7-point normalization was confirmed closed before diagnostic.
Reports, manifests, seals, summaries and tracked files inventoried.
Manifest file_hashes were scanned and summarized.
Seal manifest references and manifest hashes were scanned and summarized.
Diagnostic decision generated for unified 7-level interface architecture readiness.
Output scope is exactly report, manifest, seal and summary.
